name: [YAOC2 Sandbox] TheHive Case Create
_doc: Sandbox workflow for action: case_create_thehive. Called by the policy gateway after an allow/approval decision. Creates a TheHive 4 case from the action parameters, optionally adds observables and tasks, and returns the case ID and URL to the gateway.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: $json.title, description: $json.description, severity: $json.severity, tlp: $json.tlp, tags: $json.tags, flag: false, status: 'Open' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ dataType: $json.observables[0].type ?? 'other', data: $json.observables[0].value, message: $json.observables[0].description ?? 'Added by YAOC2', tlp: $json.tlp, tags: $json.tags }) }}
